comment: FRN-focused mini-curve set for Tier 2.3.2. Only SOFR_OIS_CURVE is required — the FRN reconciliation path consumes only this curve. Rates are a plausible synthetic SOFR OIS term structure for 2025-06-30, anchored to the published overnight fixing (4.45%) and shaped to reflect the rate-cut path implied by the fixing trajectory through year-end. The reconciliation test only requires Convex and QL to see identical inputs; market accuracy of the curve doesn't affect the equality check.

curves.note: Synthetic — see comment above. Both benches consume the same zero rates so the reconciliation is meaningful regardless of market accuracy.
